networkDisclosure.name: Network use (AI analysis)
networkDisclosure.desc: When you run Vault Analysis or generate tab insights, the plugin sends note text and analysis prompts to Google's Gemini API (generativelanguage.googleapis.com) using your API key. Nothing is sent on plugin load. Graph metrics and caches stay on your device. See the README Privacy & network section.

uiLanguage.name: UI language
uiLanguage.desc: Language for plugin menus, settings, and labels.

aiResponseLanguage.name: AI response language
aiResponseLanguage.desc: Language for all AI-generated text (note summaries, structure, evolution, and actions). Auto picks English or 简体中文 from your vault or Obsidian language.

commands.generateVaultAnalysis: Generate AI analysis for entire vault

errors.quotaExhausted: Free-tier daily limit reached. Retry tomorrow.
errors.rateLimit: API rate limit exceeded. Please try again later.

notices.wasmInitFailed: Failed to initialize Graph Analysis WASM module: {{message}}
notices.exclusionStatsConsole: Check console for detailed exclusion statistics. {{count}} files excluded.
notices.configureApiKey: Please configure your Gemini API key in settings to use vault analysis.
notices.noFilesAfterExclusion: No files found for analysis after applying exclusion rules.
notices.allFilesUpToDate: All files are up to date. No changes detected. ({{count}} files unchanged)
notices.enhancingWithMetrics: Enhancing vault analysis with graph metrics...
notices.enhancedWithMetrics: Vault analysis enhanced with graph metrics!
notices.noAnalysisForEnhance: No existing vault analysis found. Generate analysis first.
notices.enhanceMetricsPrompt: Your vault analysis exists but lacks graph metrics. Click to enhance it with centrality scores.
notices.loadVaultAnalysisFailed: Failed to load vault analysis results
notices.vaultAnalysisInProgress: Advanced analysis is still running. Results will open automatically when finished.
notices.connectionsWritten: Successfully added {{count}} connection to your notes.
notices.connectionsWritten_other: Successfully added {{count}} connections to your notes.
notices.connectionsWriteError: Failed to write connections. Check console for details.
notices.vaultAnalysisStarting: Starting vault analysis for {{count}} files. Est. ~{{minutes}} min
notices.vaultAnalysisUpdating: Updating analysis: {{changed}} changed, {{new}} new, {{unchanged}} unchanged (processing {{processing}} files). Est. ~{{minutes}} min
notices.vaultCompleteQuota: Saved partial results ({{success}}/{{total}} files). Free tier limit: ~500 notes per day. Continue the remaining {{remaining}} notes after {{retryTime}} by running analysis again.
notices.vaultCompleteIncrementalOk: Analysis updated successfully! Processed {{success}} changed/new files ({{changed}} changed, {{new}} new), kept {{unchanged}} unchanged, removed {{deleted}} deleted.
notices.vaultCompleteIncrementalWarn: Analysis update completed with some issues. Processed {{success}} files successfully, {{failed}} failed, kept {{unchanged}} unchanged, removed {{deleted}} deleted.
notices.vaultCompleteFullOk: Vault analysis with graph metrics completed successfully! Processed {{success}} files. Results saved to plugin data folder
notices.vaultCompleteFullWarn: Vault analysis with graph metrics completed with some issues. Processed {{success}} files successfully, {{failed}} failed. Results saved to plugin data folder

graph.betweennessDesc: Measures how often a node acts as a bridge along the shortest path between two other nodes. Higher values indicate more important bridge nodes.
graph.closenessDesc: Measures how close a node is to all other nodes in the network. Higher values indicate nodes that can quickly reach or communicate with other nodes.
graph.eigenvectorDesc: Measures node importance based on the importance of its neighbors. Higher values indicate nodes connected to other important nodes.

tooltip.noteNotFound: Note not found in vault. It may have been renamed or deleted.
tooltip.noFilePath: No file path associated with this node.

vaultAnalysis.buttonDesc: AI-powered analysis of your entire vault to extract summaries, keywords, knowledge domains, and graph centrality metrics. Shift+click to force refresh graph metrics.
vaultAnalysis.noSearchResults: No results found matching your search.
vaultAnalysis.noAnalysisYet: No vault analysis has been generated yet
vaultAnalysis.generatePrompt: Click the button below to analyze your entire vault and extract summaries, keywords, and knowledge domains from all notes.
vaultAnalysis.structureEmptyDesc: Generate AI-powered analysis to unlock advanced knowledge structure insights.
vaultAnalysis.structureFeatureSunburst: Interactive sunburst chart — explore hierarchical knowledge domains
vaultAnalysis.structureFeatureNetwork: Knowledge network analysis — identify bridge notes, foundations, and authorities
vaultAnalysis.structureFeatureGaps: Knowledge gaps discovery — find underexplored areas in your vault
vaultAnalysis.structureFeatureDistribution: Domain distribution — see how your knowledge is organized across fields
vaultAnalysis.privacyNote1: This analysis uses Google Gemini AI to extract insights from your vault. We only send note summaries and metadata (keywords, domains, graph metrics) to the AI—never full note content. This protects your privacy and significantly reduces token usage.
vaultAnalysis.privacyNote2: Before AI analysis, we use deterministic methods (graph theory, statistical analysis, kde distributions) to preprocess your vault data, ensuring accurate and efficient insights.
vaultAnalysis.cachedNote: Results will be cached for future use.
vaultAnalysis.generateVaultFirst: Please generate vault analysis first to access this feature.
vaultAnalysis.evolutionEmptyDesc: Knowledge evolution analysis requires AI-powered vault analysis to be completed first.
vaultAnalysis.placeholderTimeline: Generate analysis to summarize key phases and milestones in how your vault developed over time.
vaultAnalysis.placeholderTopic: Generate analysis to highlight when new topics and knowledge domains first appeared in your vault.
vaultAnalysis.placeholderFocus: Generate analysis to compare recent focus areas with earlier periods and identify notable shifts.
vaultAnalysis.evolutionFeatureTimeline: Knowledge development timeline — track how your understanding evolved
vaultAnalysis.evolutionFeatureTopic: Topic introduction patterns — see when different subjects entered your system
vaultAnalysis.evolutionFeatureFocus: Focus shift analysis — compare current interests vs historical patterns
vaultAnalysis.loadingIncludesAll: This includes knowledge structure, evolution, and recommendations.
vaultAnalysis.tabDescStructure: domain classification, hierarchical structure, and network analysis
vaultAnalysis.tabDescEvolution: timeline analysis, topic patterns, and focus shifts
vaultAnalysis.tabDescActions: maintenance tasks, connection opportunities, and learning paths
vaultAnalysis.aboutIntro: Vault analysis uses AI to analyze your entire Obsidian vault and provides:
vaultAnalysis.requirementsApiKey: Google Gemini API key (configured in plugin settings)
vaultAnalysis.exclusionsDesc: The analysis respects your exclusion settings for folders and tags, ensuring only relevant notes are processed.
vaultAnalysis.rateLimitingDesc: Processing is done in batches with delays to respect API rate limits. Large vaults may take several minutes to complete.
vaultAnalysis.allAnalysesSuccess: AI Knowledge Analysis completed successfully! Results cached for future use.

evolution.title: Knowledge evolution analysis
evolution.emptyDesc: Generate vault analysis to see your knowledge evolution insights.
evolution.emptyStateMessage: Generate AI analysis to see your knowledge evolution insights and patterns over time.

actions.emptyDesc: Generate vault analysis to see personalized action recommendations.
actions.emptyStateMessage: Generate AI analysis to get personalized action recommendations for your vault.
actions.maintenanceDesc: Notes that need review, updates, or improvements
actions.learningPathsDesc: Recommended sequences for learning and exploration

domainChart.generateFirst: Please generate vault analysis with knowledge domain classification to see domain distribution.
